title: murdannia lineolata
intro: Murdannia lineolata, also known as the grass-leaved mudan or line-leaved mudan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Murdannia lineolata include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Murdannia lineolata is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and its roots, leaves, and stems are used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia.
